title: Dream — mom-staged shooter drill where Yahir freezes at the garage
html:
Dream — mom-staged shooter drill where Yahir freezes at the garage

Source: 2020-06-13 Apple Note dream entry. 17-year-old Yahir wakes (in the dream) at 4 AM to his mom handing him a gun, telling him "he's here" — the man who'd been "messing with my family." The shooter spots Yahir through the garage window, smiles, and Yahir freaks out. He fails to ambush during the garage-door open. Mom reveals it was a setup — she paid "Chase Wonnel" to run the drill. Lesson: I was a pussy, and that pussy could have cost the family everything.

TL;DR

  • Vivid family-defense dream: mom-staged drill, dad slightly drunk, Yermers hiding in a "shitty hiding spot," shooter recognized as long-running family-threat figure.
  • The fail-state is freeze — "I bewildered and have no sense of direction" — and the post-mortem moral is "I could have ended it right then and there if I would have jumped him." Yahir grading himself on hypothetical kinetic action.
  • Names a specific paid actor: Chase Wonnel (likely a phonetic mishearing in the dream — single mention, queued to Potential Entities).
  • Reads as a 17-year-old's violence as only tool anxiety dream — companion to the 2020-05-07 "weird tribal type of fight with my buddies" dream and the 2020-04-30 Hannah Crocker water-game dream.
  • Closes ambivalent — "because of that I could have saved them and gotten all of us, including me, out of it safe" — the freeze isn't moralized as cowardice so much as missed-opportunity accounting.

Pattern observed

Part of the 2020 family-defense dream cluster (March–June 2020, peak COVID lockdown at the Grants Pass house). Dreams in this stretch keep staging Yahir as the man-of-the-house under test, with mom as orchestrator and dad as compromised. Compare the 2020-03-30 "Mrs. Ransom" dream — same structure (neighbor antagonist, Yahir as solo defender, family on the line, theft + counter-theft).

Open questions

  • Who is "Chase Wonnel"? Real Grants Pass acquaintance or pure dream-fabrication?
  • Why does mom keep being the orchestrator-of-tests in this dream cluster?

Related

  • dream journal
  • yahir family
  • grants pass or
  • covid pandemic era
  • violence as only effective tool
